name: Fresh Apple Muffins-
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine and sugar replacement until smooth.
2. Add the beaten egg to the mixture and stir well.
3. Gradually stir in the remaining ingredients: flour, salt, baking powder, and skim milk until just combined.
4. Gently fold in the chopped apple until evenly distributed throughout the batter.
5. Fill each prepared muffin cup about two-thirds full with the batter.
6. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
7. Optional: For added flavor, sprinkle a dash of cinnamon, nutmeg, ginger, and cloves over the top of each muffin before baking.
The recipe yields approximately 12 muffins.
